{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":32},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6971256912139256590","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我看过镜花缘，好看，虽然有点难懂，不过读起来很押韵"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1623122240,"group_id":"6906405933430082567","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"00年，随便看看就好 ，满足自己。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6xRi9c0HOhvhtphsCMlbmU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/d276f0610f934bffa2bc1d67f3d5a8fd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623267&x-signature=RtFiMGzcbPXCvcZFb9jtIrXeP5I%3D","user_id":"110004341042","user_name":"芊芊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110004341042","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6906405933430082567","book_info":{"abstract":"在现代纷繁复杂、物欲横流的社会中，读上一本既能获取知识、启迪心智，又能丰富想象、开拓视野的好书是一件令人向往的事情。《山海经》就是这样一本能让你受益良多的好书。
由于这部书年代久远，文字艰涩难解，许多读者由于文字的障碍，不能领略《山海经》的全部风采。于是我们把全书译成白话文，并加以注释，选配了大量不同时代的《山海经》的插图，便于读者观赏和阅读。相信本书的出版，会对广大《山海经》爱好者有所助益。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/4f1d7657a166416a8cf170e9863cfd93~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"傅硕 本书不仅是一部讲述山川河流的地理书，更是一部包罗万象的上古百科全书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689679944,"group_id":"6906405933430082567","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+nCPaMX0QE4NSAhc4TeemQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"88288309297","user_name":"kyojoyce"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"88288309297","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6906405933430082567","book_info":{"abstract":"在现代纷繁复杂、物欲横流的社会中，读上一本既能获取知识、启迪心智，又能丰富想象、开拓视野的好书是一件令人向往的事情。《山海经》就是这样一本能让你受益良多的好书。

由于这部书年代久远，文字艰涩难解，许多读者由于文字的障碍，不能领略《山海经》的全部风采。于是我们把全书译成白话文，并加以注释，选配了大量不同时代的《山海经》的插图，便于读者观赏和阅读。相信本书的出版，会对广大《山海经》爱好者有所助益。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/4f1d7657a166416a8cf170e9863cfd93~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"傅硕 译注","author_id":"","book_id":"6906405933430082567","book_name":"山海经","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d880","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"81.1万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":941,"name":"文学经典","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=941&name=文学经典&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":116,"name":"国学","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=116&name=国学&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6906414848989626894","read_count":"2858","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"196722"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"20","tags":"文学经典,国学","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/4f1d7657a166416a8cf170e9863cfd93~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779287945&x-signature=9xO2h8XzAkW2ftZa0AGZmJCSqwM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":89,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":12221},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"在现代纷繁复杂、物欲横流的社会中，读上一本既能获取知识、启迪心智，又能丰富想象、开拓视野的好书是一件令人向往的事情。《山海经》就是这样一本能让你受益良多的好书。
